output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?winner ?winnerLabel WHERE {
  ?category wdt:P3660 wd:Q1137234 .
  ?category rdfs:label "Entertainer of the Year" @en .
  ?winner wdt:P166 ?category .
  ?winner rdfs:label ?winnerLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?winnerLabel) = 'en')
  .
}

output.answer:
<tool_call>
{"name": "execute", "arguments": {"kg": "wikidata", "sparql": "SELECT ?winner ?winnerLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q1137234 wdt:P527 ?category.
  ?category rdfs:label ?label.
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = 'en').
  FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?label)), "entertainer of the year \(cma\)", "i"))
  ?winner wdt:P166 ?category.
  ?winner rdfs:label ?winnerLabel.
  FILTER(LANG(?winnerLabel) = 'en').
}"}}
</tool_call>
